ui.settings_faq_desc: Answers about coins, years, tokens, badges and username.
ui.settings_msg_saved_local: Language saved on the device. Server sync later.
ui.faq_subtitle: Find here the answers to the most frequent questions.
ui.faq_a1: At the end of a run, you earn 10 VCoins for each full year. One year equals 4 choices. Some events can also change your reward.
ui.faq_a2: The game counts 4 choices as 1 full year. Until you reach 4 choices, you stay in the same displayed year.
ui.faq_a3: Tokens are used for in-game help. They let you revive, preview the effect of the next 15 choices on the gauges, go back 3 choices, or set a gauge back to 50%.
ui.faq_q4: How do I increase my final reward?
ui.faq_a4: When a run ends, a button lets you watch a rewarded ad. If your base reward is below 100, it becomes 100 VCoins. Otherwise, it is doubled. If the ad is not completed or unavailable, the reward stays normal.
ui.faq_a5: Badges are separated by universe. They unlock during a run if you are still alive at the right moment: wood at 20 choices, bronze at 40 choices, silver at 60 choices, gold at 100 choices, and crystal at 150 choices.
ui.faq_q6: How do I change my username?
ui.faq_a6: Go to Profile, tap the button to edit your username, enter your new name, and save it. The username must be unique, contain between 3 and 20 characters, and use only unaccented letters, numbers, underscores _, or hyphens -.
ui.faq_a7: VCoins are used to unlock universes and some in-game customizations.
ui.faq_q8: How do I unlock a universe?
ui.faq_a8: From the home screen, you can unlock a universe with your VCoins when it is not already included in your current access.
ui.faq_q9: Which universes are free at the start?
ui.faq_a9: At the start, two universes are unlocked.
ui.faq_q10: How much does a universe cost?
ui.faq_a10: At the moment, a universe costs 600 VCoins when it is not already unlocked.
ui.faq_q11: What does the No Ads offer do?
ui.faq_a11: No Ads removes interstitial ads. Rewarded ads remain available when you want to get an optional reward.
ui.faq_a12: Diamond enables No Ads and unlocks all current universes in the game.
ui.faq_q13: How do friend invites and cross-promo work?
ui.faq_a13: Friend invites let you earn VCoins when a valid installation is detected. Cross-promo between other VBoldStudio apps can also grant a separate reward when the planned conditions are met.
ui.profile_username_hint: 3 to 20 characters. Letters, numbers, _ or -. The username must be unique.
ui.profile_username_err_cost_failed: The username was changed but the cost could not be charged.

universe_buy.desc: This universe is locked. You can unlock it with {price} VCoins, unlock it directly through the store, or open the shop.
universe_buy.err_unlock_insufficient: You do not have enough VCoins. Balance: {balance} / Price: {price}
universe_buy.err_app_only: Play Store purchase available only in the app.
universe_buy.err_unlock_after_buy: Purchase validated, but unlock failed. Try again later.
universe_buy.err_unlock_after_iap: Purchase validated, but unlock is not possible right now. Try again from the shop.

ui.faq_q14: Are there secrets in the app?
ui.faq_a14: Sometimes, certain places react to slightly absurd ideas. Like typing ladybugcometome in the username field... or baudelaire, without even mentioning someone's favorite poet.

profile.secretErrGeneric: The secret was found, but an error prevented it from opening correctly.
profile.ladybugSecretFinishBodySeen: You already received the 50 VCoins for this one.
profile.baudelaireSecretBody:
Without cease the Demon stirs beside me;
He swims around me like impalpable air;
I breathe him in and feel him burn my lungs
And fill them with an endless, guilty desire.

At times, knowing my great love of Art,
He takes the shape of the most seductive woman,
And, under specious pretexts of melancholy,
Accustoms my lips to infamous potions.

Thus he leads me, far from the gaze of God,
Panting and broken down with weariness, into the midst
Of the plains of Ennui, deep and deserted,

And throws into my eyes, full of confusion,
Soiled garments, open wounds,
And the bloody pageantry of Destruction.
profile.badgeUnlockWood: Unlocked from 20 choices in a single run.
profile.badgeUnlockCrystal: Unlocked from 150 choices in a single run.

hell_king.title: King of Hell
hell_king.desc: Lead the demonic legions, manage the flow of damned souls and maintain order in hell while influencing the surface.

heaven_king.title: Ruler of Heaven
heaven_king.desc: Judge prayers, contain fanaticism and decide how far Heaven should intervene in the world of mortals.

medieval_king.title: Medieval king
medieval_king.desc: Church, army, people, treasury. Every choice brings your kingdom closer to prosperity or revolt.

western_president.title: President
western_president.desc: Public opinion, economy, defense and diplomatic crises. One signature can change everything.

mega_corp_ceo.title: CEO
mega_corp_ceo.desc: Investors, employees, regulators and brand image. Raise the valuation without blowing everything up.

new_world_explorer.title: Explorer
new_world_explorer.desc: Conquer, convert and seek local wealth while answering to your crown.

vampire_lord.title: Vampire lord
vampire_lord.desc: Spread your influence in the shadows. Too much blood attracts hunters, too much caution weakens your clan.

finish.title: Congratulations
finish.body: You are ready to rule many universes.

common.introGoal: Maintain the balance for {target} choices to earn your first promotion.
common.nextGoal: Maintain the balance for {remaining} more choices to reach your next promotion.
common.maxGoal: You have reached the highest rank in this universe. Now prove you can keep it.

hell_king.intro: Welcome, lost soul. In Hell, every decision leaves a mark.
hell_king.wood: You no longer wander without purpose. You now serve the infernal order.
hell_king.bronze: You have earned your place among Hell's servants. Do not falter.
hell_king.silver: Your influence is growing. Lesser demons are beginning to obey you.
hell_king.gold: The flames now bend more easily to your will. You are feared now.
hell_king.crystal: You stand at the summit. Rule Hell like a true king.

heaven_king.intro: Welcome, pure soul. Here, every choice must preserve the harmony of Heaven.
heaven_king.wood: You have taken your first steps into the light. Stay the course.
heaven_king.bronze: Your role now goes beyond that of a simple messenger. Heaven is watching you.
heaven_king.silver: You have become a true guardian of Heaven. Your responsibility is growing.
heaven_king.gold: Your authority shines like that of an archangel. Keep lifting this universe higher.
heaven_king.crystal: You have reached the highest rank. Rule Heaven with wisdom.

vampire_lord.intro: Welcome to the night. Every choice will feed or weaken your rise.
vampire_lord.wood: Blood is already calling to you. You are no longer entirely human.
vampire_lord.bronze: You have entered the true night. Your name is beginning to spread.
vampire_lord.silver: You are now a fully accomplished vampire. The shadows recognize you.
vampire_lord.gold: Your presence inspires fear. Few still dare to challenge you.
vampire_lord.crystal: You have become the master of darkness. Rule the night.

mega_corp_ceo.intro: Welcome, intern. Here, every decision matters and every mistake is costly.
mega_corp_ceo.wood: Well done. You are no longer just an intern. You are now an employee.
mega_corp_ceo.bronze: Your work has paid off. You are now taking on real responsibilities.
mega_corp_ceo.silver: You are now leading others. The results speak for you.
mega_corp_ceo.gold: You have reached a level where the company truly depends on your decisions.
mega_corp_ceo.crystal: You are now the CEO. It is up to you to keep the company at the top.

western_president.intro: Welcome, advisor. In the West, the balance of power never holds for long.
western_president.wood: You have gained political weight. People are starting to listen to you.
western_president.bronze: You are no longer just following the movement. You now help lead it.
western_president.silver: You are now governor. Your choices are already shaping the territory.
western_president.gold: You now govern on a larger scale. The country expects a great deal from you.
western_president.crystal: You are president now. It is up to you to hold the nation together.

new_world_explorer.intro: Welcome, sailor. The New World forgives neither hesitation nor excess.
new_world_explorer.wood: You have left behind the simple role of crewman. You observe and you learn.
new_world_explorer.bronze: You venture farther than the others. Your eye is becoming valuable.
new_world_explorer.silver: You are now a true explorer. People rely on your judgment.
new_world_explorer.gold: You command the expedition now. Every choice can change the fate of the voyage.
new_world_explorer.crystal: You represent the Crown. The discovered world will now speak in your name.
